items: Dashboard 面板折叠用 CollapsiblePanel（variant sidebar/workspace），localStorage 持久化
脑图树边使用 sourceHandle=tree，避免与 Story 依赖 handle 冲突导致连线丢失
项目规范存 loop-data/project-spec.json，Dashboard 用 ProjectSpecPanel，模板见 project-spec-templates.ts
Story 属性面板分区用 PropsSectionCollapse + loop-props-section-* localStorage；未保存编辑用 useSyncedStoryFields 防刷新覆盖
ReactFlow 画布容器需 flex:1 + 完整 flex 高度链（含 ant-collapse-item），子元素 position:absolute 不会撑开父级
工作区视图切换用 loop-workspace-view localStorage + mm-view-tabs；树形数据由 treeViewData.buildProjectTreeData 从 filteredTree 构建
Story 属性面板编辑区用 loop-props-section-edit 合并输入与操作（props-story-form__actions），进度日志独立 loop-props-section-progress
Dashboard 主布局用 antd Splitter（sidebar/workspace/脑图属性），尺寸持久化 loop-*-split localStorage + useSplitSizes
脑图工作区左侧用嵌套 Splitter：结构树（loop-tree-split，collapsible）+ 脑图画布；右属性 loop-mindmap-split
主工作区脑图用 app-workspace__main 直接承载 MindMapPanel，勿 CollapsiblePanel/用户输入标题
主工作区脑图区勿 mm-toolbar 操作提示与 Empty 描述文案，空项目仅保留 +Feature/+Story 按钮
Codebase Patterns 侧栏用 features/patterns 卡片列表（pattern-card），正文与操作区分行，长文本 patternPreview 截断+展开
Feature 属性面板用 features/mindmap-props + PropsSectionCollapse（loop-props-section-feature-edit/stories）；子 Story 列表 featureChildStories 排序
项目元信息存 loop-data/project.json（branchName/description/vision）；Dashboard 用 features/project-meta ProjectMetaPanel；CLI loop update-project 与 POST /api/project/update
Milestone 可选 targetDate/version 存 loop-data/milestones；展示用 features/milestones/milestoneLabel；Dashboard 双击筛选 Tag 打开编辑弹窗
空叶子 FT 判定用 feature-leaf.ts / emptyLeafFeature.ts；仅空叶子可 delete-feature；脑图 sublabel 与属性面板 Alert 提示补 US 或删除
Story workType 存 loop-data/stories/*.json；Dashboard 属性面板用 features/story-work-type Select 编辑；CLI --work-type 与 API workType 字段同步
loop plan 单次规划：resolvePlannerPromptPath 优先级 LOOP_PLANNER_PROMPT → loop-data/PLANNER.md → templates/PLANNER.md；测试 features/plan/plan.test.ts
循环执行运行时状态存 .loop-status/（run.json、runs.json、dashboard.json、run-live 等，不进 git）；PRD/项目数据仍存 loop-data/
Dashboard CLI 进程状态存 .loop-status/dashboard.json；start/stop/status 见 dashboard-process.ts；测试 features/dashboard/dashboard.test.ts
loop run 有限轮外循环：resolveAgentPromptPath 优先级 LOOP_AGENT_PROMPT → loop-data/AGENT.md → templates/AGENT.md；run.json/runs.json 存 .loop-status/；测试 features/loop-run/loop-run.test.ts
并行 Worker：claim-story/release-claim/next-stories 与 loop run --workers N；claimedBy 存 stories JSON；getNextStories 跳过已认领；测试 features/parallel-worker/parallel-worker.test.ts

Agent live 输出：run-live.ts 写 .loop-status/run-live.json 与 runs/<worker>-live.json；loop run output 读 getAllRunLiveForDashboard；Dashboard AgentLivePanel 展示 phase/多 worker/空态；complete/stop 时 finishRunLiveForStory/clearAllRunLive 收尾；测试 features/run-live/run-live.test.ts

脑图节点增删：空态 mindmap-workspace__empty 提供 +Feature/+Story；选中 root/feature 时 MindMapNode 与 NodePropsPanel MindMapAddButtons 共用 openCreate→api.addFeature/addStory 写 loop-data；ReactFlow onNodesDelete 经 canDeleteFeature/canHardDeleteStory 调 deleteFeature/deleteStory 后 onRefresh；测试 features/mindmap-nodes/mindmap-nodes.test.ts
PRD 导航：loop prd/tree/next/next-stories/patterns/spec/spec-templates 输出结构化 JSON；next-stories --limit N；测试 features/prd-nav/prd-nav.test.ts
tree CLI story 节点含 workType（normalizeUserStory 推断）；TreeNode 类型同步；测试 prd-nav/prd-nav.test.ts
Story 生命周期：request-removal/archive/restore CLI 与 API；tree story 节点 removalRequested 标记等待删除；归档后 getActiveStories 排除、进度保留；restore 恢复关键字段；测试 features/story-lifecycle/story-lifecycle.test.ts
loop bug：未完成 Story 追加不应出现 AC（reportBug appended），已完成派生修复 Story（created + 不应再出现）；CLI --ready/--title/--change-note；测试 features/bug-report/bug-report.test.ts
持续监听：watch 或 run --until-stop 在无 ready Story 时 sleep 等待不退出；run stop [--worker w0] 与 run status 见 run-process.ts；状态存 .loop-status/run.json 与 run-coordinator.json；测试 features/loop-run/loop-run.test.ts

Git worktree 并行：workers>1 时 worktree-pool.ts 在 .loop-status/worktrees/<workerId> 创建 loop/<worker>-<story> 分支；LOOP_PROJECT_ROOT 固定主项目根保证 loop-data 读写；迭代结束 removeWorktree，外循环结束 cleanupAllWorktrees；测试 features/worktree-pool/worktree-pool.test.ts

外循环迭代历史：runs.json 存 .loop-status/（iteration/tool/storyId/workerId/status/startedAt/endedAt）；db.startRun/endRun/getRuns 与 status.activeRun 共用；Dashboard RunsPanel 展示；测试 features/run-history/run-history.test.ts

脑图拖拽改父级：db.moveMindMapItem + reorderFeature/reorderStory；UI 拖放 mindmapReparent（resolveDropTargetId/dropTargetToParentId）+ MindMapPanel onNodeDragStop；同级重排 reorder.ts + 节点上下按钮/PageUp/PageDown；非法移动 db 抛错经 run()→ErrorAlert；测试 features/mindmap-drag/mindmap-drag.test.ts

Milestone 筛选：filterTreeByMilestone（lib/treeFilter.ts）+ MindMapPanel mm-milestone-bar（全部/具体/无/新建）；结构树与脑图共用 filteredTree；创建编辑 api.addMilestone/updateMilestone，双击 Tag 编辑；测试 features/milestones/milestone-filter.test.ts

工作区状态栏：resolveWorkspaceStatusView（features/workspace-status）合并 status.activeRun/activeRuns 与 loopRunner；App.tsx 底部 WorkspaceStatusBar 读 data.loopRunner；GET /api/dashboard 含 getLoopRunStatus；测试 features/workspace-status/workspace-status.test.ts

Story 依赖：db.addStoryDependency/removeStoryDependency（from→to 写入 dependsOn）；MindMapPanel 仅 dep-out→dep-in 连线触发 api；buildProjectMindMap 生成 dep: 边，isDependencyEdge 识别；环路与自依赖在 db.setStoryDependsOn 拦截；测试 features/story-dependency/story-dependency.test.ts
顶栏项目概览：resolveAppToolbarView（features/app-toolbar）从 db.getStatus 聚合字段解析完成/待做/草稿/阻塞/进度与 activeRun 运行态；AppToolbar 消费 view 展示项目名/分支/统计胶囊；测试 features/app-toolbar/app-toolbar.test.ts

运行中 Story 高亮：resolveRunningStoryIds（lib/runningStories）合并 activeRun/activeRuns/loopRunner/runLive；App.tsx→MindMapPanel runningStoryIds；脑图 mm-node--running/执行中 badge、结构树 project-tree-view__running；测试 features/running-story-highlight/running-story-highlight.test.ts

脑图 Story 生命周期：StoryLifecycleActions（NodePropsPanel）+ deletable can* 权限；request-removal/archive/restore/purge 经 api.ts 调 HTTP；脑图 pending_removal kind + mm-node--pending_removal；归档 TrashList + archived 属性面板；测试 features/story-lifecycle/story-lifecycle.test.ts

Dashboard 外循环启停：features/loop-run-control/LoopRunControl 调用 api.startLoopRun/stopLoopRun；buildStartLoopRunPayload 对齐 CLI --tool/--workers/--until-stop；启停后 App refresh 联动 AgentLivePanel/RunsPanel/WorkspaceStatusBar
